## Type

- [ ] Formula update (new version of an existing SKU)
- [ ] New formula
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security / supply-chain

## Verification

- [ ] `brew style` clean locally (or covered by CI)
- [ ] `brew audit --strict --except=license <formula>` clean
- [ ] If formula changed: tested `brew install <formula>` against the matching release tag
- [ ] If install scripts changed: ran the affected codepath end-to-end on macOS
